name: neoncrm-event-registration-duplicate-resolution-app
description: Cloud Run Node.js service to detect and route duplicate NeonCRM accounts created through public event registrations.
filePurpose: Defines the Node.js package metadata, runtime constraints, scripts, and production dependencies for the NeonCRM duplicate resolution Cloud Run app.
fileExplanation: package.json must remain valid JSON, so explanatory content is stored as metadata fields rather than JavaScript-style comments. npm ignores these custom fields, while developers can still read the purpose directly inside the file.
